pillars.label: Prior de forca relativa (Elo global iterativo)
pillars.source: Iterative opponent-adjusted Elo prior computed from FIFA match records

pillars.label: Forca media dos adversarios
pillars.source: FIFA calendar match records + local FIFA/SUM opponent ratings
